ec2_start_requires: runtime lane queue selected lane order=1
model registry coverage pass_local_only for active lane

plan.purpose: Project source of truth, trackers, instructions, QA evidence, and certifications.

workflows.purpose: Runtime-facing exported ComfyUI workflow files copied from the validated Plan templates.

models.purpose: Local placement guide for checkpoints, LoRAs, VAEs, ControlNet models, and embeddings. Binaries are ignored.

runtime_artifacts.purpose: Local landing area for run manifests, pullbacks, and review artifacts that are not committed unless explicitly approved.

configs.purpose: Safe-to-commit runtime configuration and handoff notes.
